title: rubus polybelus
intro: Rubus polybelus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus polybelus include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Rubus polybelus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
